description: Full redesign of the Acme corporate website with a modern UI, improved performance, and mobile-first approach.
Design a complete brand identity including logo, color palette, typography system, and brand guidelines document.
Build a real-time shipment tracking dashboard for internal use by the operations and logistics team.
Develop a campaign microsite for the annual fundraising drive with donor stories, progress tracker, and donation integration.
Redesign the user onboarding experience for the Vertex SaaS platform to reduce early drop-off rates and improve activation.
Build a searchable property listings portal with map integration, advanced filters, virtual tour embeds, and agent contact forms.
Mobile-first progressive web app for hotel guests to access room services, restaurant menus, concierge bookings, and local guides.
